/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcamera_stream__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libcamera_stream__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/camera_stream__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/camera_stream/msg/detail/share_image__description.c.o CMakeFiles/camera_stream__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/camera_stream/msg/detail/share_image__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/camera_stream__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/camera_stream/msg/detail/share_image__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
